title: BEM-841 execute next
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 08:51 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if rs=='next_repair_dispatch_results':
    # Make queue processor output a proof file even if gh dispatch fails.
    proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
    if proc.exists():
        txt=proc.read_text(errors='ignore')
        if 'bem841_processor_entry_marker' not in txt:
            txt=txt.replace('echo "processed_queue_items=$count"', 'printf \'{"status":"processor_finished","processed":%s,"time":"%s","marker":"bem841_processor_entry_marker"}\\n\' "$count" "$now" > governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem841_processor_summary.status.json\necho "processed_queue_items=$count"')
            proc.write_text(txt)
            created_files.append(str(proc))
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 dispatch result proof probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_repair_applied'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify bem841_processor_summary.status.json'
elif rs=='next_repair_claude_runtime_state':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 Claude runtime proof probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify runtime state'
elif rs=='next_repair_real_claude_response':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_real_response_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 real Claude response probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='real_response_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify real Claude response'
elif rs=='next_process_real_claude_response':
    status='process_real_response_selected'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
else:
    status='unknown_route_noop'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-840 route'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'route_status':rs,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_next.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute BEM-840 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_next.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-840 selected next action by applying a direct proof repair or queueing the next Claude probe')
"""
No issue comments.
